case_title: KO-RI INCORPORATED, A CA. CORP. VS. JENNIFER LEAHY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEAHY, JENNIFER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KO-RI INCORPORATED, A CA. CORP. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
JPT. Cary Gold, Clerks: M. Valejo, CSR. Joe Vickstein.
Arnold Evje, II. Esq., for Plaintiff Ko-Ri Incorporate present by Property Manager.
Defendant, Jennifer Leahy present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Judgment pursuant to stipulation filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
